prompt: A black and white infrared trail camera photo taken at night in a dense coniferous forest. In the foreground on the left, a large black bear is walking past, appearing slightly motion-blurred. In the center of the clearing, there is a perfectly circular, dark, barren patch of dirt on the forest floor. Hovering just above the ground at the far edge of this dark circle is a bright, glowing, spherical orb of light. The image features a grainy night vision aesthetic with visible underbrush, pine tree trunks, and a tree stump in the bottom right corner. A black data bar runs across the bottom edge containing white text: on the far left, an oval logo reading "RECONYX", followed by the timestamp "03:14:22 11-OCT-2023", then "TEMP: 4°C", and on the far right, "TRIGGER: MOTION DUAL TRIGGER".
